name: Team Mark Warner
subject: 📝SIGN: Help the ERA become part of the Constitution
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Mark Warner
body:
Will you show your support for the ERA?
|
---
| | Derek --

It's 2020, and it's still constitutional to discriminate on the basis of sex.

We're at a pivotal moment where Virginia could push the entire country forward. Today, the Virginia State House and Senate both passed the Equal Rights Amendment (ERA), which guarantees equal protection from discrimination for all people, regardless of sex.

**[The VA General Assembly just passed the ERA-- now we need to show how many people support making the ERA part of the Constitution. ](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85d6b2/53d9897e/53580a78/1c89d47a/754645305/VEsH/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/s/warner-erapet-long")**

Lawmakers have been fighting for Constitutional equality since the ERA was first introduced to Congress in 1923. This historic amendment will enshrine equal protections for all Americans in the Constitution and ban discrimination on the basis of sex. Three-quarters of state legislatures must agree to ratify any amendment to our Constitution. Virginia ratifying the ERA brings us closer to our goal -- but the fight isn't finished.

38 states are needed to ratify the ERA -- **Virginia is the 38th.** Now, we finally have a shot at seeing the ERA become law. Virginia was the tipping point, but there's work still to be done to make the ERA part of our Constitution.

Mark is committed to continuing the fight in the Senate to ensure that everyone has equality under the law. **[Sign Mark's petition and help us demonstrate strong support for taking the next step to make the ERA part of the Constitution.](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85d6b2/53d9897e/53580a78/1c89d47a/754645305/VEsE/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/s/warner-erapet-long")** | **[SIGN ON HERE](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85d6b2/53d9897e/53580a78/1c89d47a/754645305/VEsF/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/s/warner-erapet-long")**
---
Thank you for your support,

Team Warner

**[CONTRIBUTE](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85d6b2/53d9897e/53580a78/1c89d479/754645305/VEsC/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjQyNyJ9/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/warner-db?refcode=20200115_p_1_fl_long_427__&refcode2=cont&amount=5")**

We were starting to lose hope, Team.

Republicans were spending MILLIONS to attack Democrats and advance the Trump agenda, **but Democrats weren 't donating to help us fight back. **

But then President Obama asked you to make a commitment to electing Democrats... and donations went THROUGH THE ROOF!

There are critical governors' races coming up this year, and we have the historic opportunity to win in key swing states across the country. But with the GOP massively outspending us, Democrats will lose if we don't act RIGHT NOW. **Team, we need you to answer Obama 's call and donate to elect Democrats in 2020.******

We pulled your supporter record, and here 's what we found:**

name: Booker Senate HQ
subject: This is your chance to be a founding donor of this campaign
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Cory Booker for Senate
body:
| | Cory is running for re-election to the Senate! Team, Did you see Cory's note sharing the exciting news? He's running for re-election to the Senate! Cory hasn't been afraid to stand up to Donald Trump and knows how to get things done for the people of New Jersey. It's more important now than ever before that we have his strong leadership in Washington for years to come. **[If you want to see Cory remain in the Senate, please become one of our founding donors today.](https://act.corybooker.%3D/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/corybooker-2020-launch-em?refcode=em_fr_20200115_BSHQ_20200115-fr-BSHQ-EM1-actives_actives_l1&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=")** We can't do this without you. Booker Senate HQ _\---FORWARDED MESSAGE---_ Team, Running for president was one of the greatest honors of my life. I'll always be grateful that you were one of the people who stood with me as a supporter of our grassroots campaign. **Our presidential campaign is over, but the work to make justice and opportunity real for everyone must continue.** [**That 's why I'm running for re-election to the U.S. Senate this November. If you want me to return to the Senate for another term, please consider becoming a founding donor of my campaign.**](https://act.corybooker.%3D/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/corybooker-2020-launch-em?refcode=em_fr_20200115_BSHQ_20200115-fr-BSHQ-EM1-actives_actives_l2&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=") I've had the privilege of representing New Jersey in the Senate for over six years now. Even in the face of Donald Trump's hatred and division, I'm very proud of what we've accomplished over that time. At this critical moment in our history, I refuse to believe that real progress is impossible. **I know we can do big things together because we 've done them together.** I helped pass into law historic reforms that make our criminal justice system more fair. I have been a check on Trump while in the Senate and I will continue to do so when re-elected in 2020. And I helped create landmark incentives that draw new economic investment into communities across our state that need it most. [**I hope I 'll have your support as I seek another term in the Senate. Be one of the first to chip in today to help my re-election campaign.**](https://act.corybooker.%3D/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/corybooker-2020-launch-em?refcode=em_fr_20200115_BSHQ_20200115-fr-BSHQ-EM1-actives_actives_l3&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=") From taking on the NRA, to fighting for a fairer economy, to protecting and expanding health coverage for New Jerseyans, I won't stop bringing people together to take on the biggest challenges that are leaving so many people and communities behind. I'm eager to see what we'll be able to accomplish in the years to come -- but I need your help to get there. I hope you're as excited about this as I am, team. Let's go out and win this thing.

Cory [](https://act.corybooker.%3D/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/corybooker-2020-launch-em?refcode=em_fr_20200115_BSHQ_20200115-fr-BSHQ-EM1-actives_actives_contribbutton&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=")
---
| | Paid for by Cory Booker for Senate.
---

This campaign is moving quickly. If you want the most up-to-date information, follow Cory on [Instagram](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc0fc4/5fca0d19/7a861223/291d3d67/1555497042/VEsD/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://www.instagram.com/corybooker/"), [Twitter](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc0fc4/5fca0d19/7a861223/291d3d66/1555497042/VEsA/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://twitter.com/corybooker"), and [Facebook](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc0fc4/5fca0d19/7a861223/291d3d65/1555497042/VEsB/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://www.facebook.com/corybooker").
We believe these emails are an important way to stay in touch, but if at any point you'd like to stop getting these updates, you can unsubscribe [here](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc0fc4/5fca0d19/7a861223/291d3d64/1555497042/VEsO/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://act.corybooker.com/page/s/unsubscribe").

body:

Today, the House formally sent the Articles of Impeachment against Donald Trump to the Senate. **_At almost exactly the same time,_ more damning evidence emerged, further detailing Trump's corrupt dealings with Ukraine. ** Joe isn't having it. It's now on Mitch McConnell to do the right thing and allow the Senate to hear all the evidence: [](https://secure.kennedyforma.com/page/m/363902c4/55b66746/2da4e4e3/80f9a3a/3685970597/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZHU1ZKVFZFNUJUVVVsSlE9PSI6IiIsIkpTVk1RVk5VVGtGTlJTVWwiOiIiLCJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVmFTVkFsSlE9PSI6IjE4MzI2In0%3D/?g=wJ6aEDjfd5ldgcs4t9rIVg "https://www.kennedyforma.com/petition/sham-impeachment/e/#firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&subsource=pet-2020-01-sham-impeachment-email") McConnell has bragged about his plans to rig the impeachment trial for Trump. subject: Debate night here in HQ
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Mike Bloomberg 2020
body:
We had fun yesterday with our contest winners and at the Late Show. | |
---
| | | [ ](https://mikebloomberg.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=bd4eb7384f3c2a91e96488936&id=108628a386&e=f54746ec54)
---
| | | Friend -- it was quite a debate night for the Bloomberg campaign! First, we hosted the lucky winners of last week’s contest at Team Bloomberg HQ to meet with Mike.
---
| [ ](https://mikebloomberg.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=bd4eb7384f3c2a91e96488936&id=7b1b673c0a&e=f54746ec54)
---
| Sharon from Colorado spoke with Mike about her passion for animal rescue -- and how that has led to having a lot of strange pets in her family over the years!

Mike also chatted with Alice and her 10 year old daughter, a climate activist who asked Mike to join her in a quick interview to put on her personal TikTok. She’s a reporter in the making!!

And while the team here in HQ was grabbing the country’s attention with a little fun on Twitter, our contest winners joined Mike as special guests for the live, post-debate episode of The Late Show. Our special guests watched along with the whole country as Mike talked about the big issues and cracked a few jokes that even got Colbert laughing.

[**Watch and share the interview now >>**](https://mikebloomberg.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=bd4eb7384f3c2a91e96488936&id=8922ca7a19&e=f54746ec54)

body:
| |
---
| Team: James Carville reached out earlier with an urgent message about our impending fundraising deadline. [We need your help right now. Check out the message from James (below) and rush your first donation to defeat Donald Trump >>](https://secure.michaelbennet.com/page/m/35cbabf6/134673f2/81064da/699776ea/1936254078/VEsH/?g=GUSlGlH8x8Vcy9-bgCeB4mA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/nhinvestment?refcode=EM_FR_B5_011520_AC_ND&recurring=auto&amount=1&amounts=10,29,50,100,250,500,1000")

---
[CALLING ALL DEMOCRATS!!](https://secure.michaelbennet.com/page/m/35cbabf6/134673f2/81064da/699776ea/1936254078/VEsF/?g=GUSlGlH8x8Vcy9-bgCeB4mA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/nhinvestment?refcode=EM_FR_B5_011520_AC_ND&recurring=auto&amount=1&amounts=10,29,50,100,250,500,1000")

Listen up, team.

I endorsed Michael Bennet because he would be the best President of the United States. Period.

[He has less in common with Donald Trump than any human being on the planet when it comes to worldview, priorities, and demeanor. Michael is the opposite of Trump and is the best Democrat to take him on.](https://secure.michaelbennet.com/page/m/35cbabf6/134673f2/81064da/699776ea/1936254078/VEsC/?g=GUSlGlH8x8Vcy9-bgCeB4mA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/nhinvestment?refcode=EM_FR_B5_011520_AC_ND&recurring=auto&amount=1&amounts=10,29,50,100,250,500,1000")

Michael's run a lean, scrappy campaign, but he's facing a huge fundraising deadline Thursday at midnight. If we want to beat Trump, Michael needs our help NOW!

Here's why: [Trump is raking in cash, and his donors in your area are stepping up.](https://secure.michaelbennet.com/page/m/35cbabf6/134673f2/81064da/699776ea/1936254078/VEsD/?g=GUSlGlH8x8Vcy9-bgCeB4mA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/nhinvestment?refcode=EM_FR_B5_011520_AC_ND&recurring=auto&amount=1&amounts=10,29,50,100,250,500,1000")

name: Steve Chabot
subject: Is California Becoming the Homeless State?
body:
California dreamin' No images? [Click here](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-e-jhmtlx-kujkulhluu-z/) [](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jhmtlx-kujkulhluu-r/) [](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jhmtlx-kujkulhluu-y/)
### [Is California Becoming the Homeless State?](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jhmtlx-kujkulhluu-j/)
California was the state so many Americans aspired to move to. Now, many people are fleeing California and the state is rapidly becoming the "homeless state." Sadly homelessness is a nationwide problem, including back home in Cincinnati and Hamilton County. This week I discuss this epidemic and some possible solutions. [Read this entry >>](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jhmtlx-kujkulhluu-t/)
# Previous Blog Posts
[](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jhmtlx-kujkulhluu-i/)
### [Was Trump Right to Take Out Soleimani?](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jhmtlx-kujkulhluu-d/)
Virtually all the talking heads in the media, as well as congressional Democrats, have been critical of the President's decision to take out Iranian general Qassem Soleimani. However, I think it's important to look closely at the facts and not jump to conclusions. In this week's blog, I evaluate this ongoing situation unfolding in the Middle East. [Read this entry >>](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jhmtlx-kujkulhluu-h/) [](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jhmtlx-kujkulhluu-k/)
### [My Predictions for 2020](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jhmtlx-kujkulhluu-u/)
It's that time of year again. In this week's blog I'll make my best attempt to predict what's going to happen in the upcoming year! Reds, Bengals, and Politics? You won't want to miss today's post! [Read this entry >>](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jhmtlx-kujkulhluu-o/) [](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jhmtlx-kujkulhluu-b/)
### [Merry Christmas!](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jhmtlx-kujkulhluu-n/)
In this week's blog I keep politics brief with a short update and share a Christmas greeting. [Read this entry >>](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jhmtlx-kujkulhluu-p/) [Donate](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jhmtlx-kujkulhluu-x/) [Get a Yard Sign](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jhmtlx-kujkulhluu-m/) [](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jhmtlx-kujkulhluu-c/) | [](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jhmtlx-kujkulhluu-q/)| [](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jhmtlx-kujkulhluu-a/)| [](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jhmtlx-kujkulhluu-f/)

name: Team Hick
subject: You might've picked up on this by now
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Hickenlooper for Colorado
body:
|
#
You might've picked up on this by now, folks, but John's not like most politicians. He's a geologist-turned-brewer who has won his elections by focusing on _the people_ , not petty partisan politics. You see, John's a lot more interested in finding solutions to the issues everyday folks talk about at their kitchen tables than doing the bidding of shady special interests. That's why we're depending on your grassroots donation to help us build a campaign that can win this Senate race the right way -- by relying on people chipping in what they can to make a difference without accepting a cent from corporate PACs. **So, will you donate $10 (or more!) right now to help us meet our very first fundraising deadline of the new year and flip Colorado 's Senate seat blue? Every dollar makes a difference.** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | [CHIP IN $10 NOW](https://secure.hickenlooper.%3D/?g=Wvb-QcQot1BcsCb456pUfvA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jwh-em-200115-pacs?refcode=em-200115-full&amount=10&express_lane=true&amounts=5,10,25,50,100,150,250&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&addr1=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&employer=&occupation=")

clean_body: | You might've picked up on this by now, folks, but John's not like most politicians. He's a geologist-turned-brewer who has won his elections by focusing on the people , not petty partisan politics. You see, John's a lot more interested in finding solutions to the issues everyday folks talk about at their kitchen tables than doing the bidding of shady special interests. That's why we're depending on your grassroots donation to help us build a campaign that can win this Senate race the right way -- by relying on people chipping in what they can to make a difference without accepting a cent from corporate PACs. name: Bill Hagerty
subject: BREAKING: Pelosi sends impeachment to the Senate!
body:
After 28 days of partisan games from Nancy Pelosi....

Peter,

After 28 days of partisan games from Nancy Pelosi, House Democrats officially transmitted articles of impeachment to the Senate.

Now President Trump will FINALLY be able to fight back against the Democrats' three-year witch hunt to undo the 2016 election. I'm calling on grassroots conservatives to help me send a strong message to the radical Democrats that we stand with the President.

DEFEND TRUMP & END THE WITCH HUNT

DONATE $25 - DEFEND TRUMP [https://secure.winred.com/teamhagerty/impeachment-to-the-senate?amount=25&utm_source=housefile&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=Jan%2015]

DONATE $50 - DEFEND TRUMP [https://secure.winred.com/teamhagerty/impeachment-to-the-senate?amount=50&utm_source=housefile&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=Jan%2015]

DONATE $100 - DEFEND TRUMP [https://secure.winred.com/teamhagerty/impeachment-to-the-senate?amount=100&utm_source=housefile&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=Jan%2015]

DONATE $250 - DEFEND TRUMP [https://secure.winred.com/teamhagerty/impeachment-to-the-senate?amount=250&utm_source=housefile&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=Jan%2015]

If you're like me, you're sick and tired of this sham impeachment. It's about time that Washington get back to work for the American people.

But that's only going to happen if we elect more conservative fighters who will stand with President Trump. I'm ready to do it, but I need your help.

Please donate whatever you can right now. [https://secure.winred.com/teamhagerty/impeachment-to-the-senate?amount=50&utm_source=housefile&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=Jan%2015]

Thank you for your time.

Bill Hagerty

Candidate for U.S. Senate (R-TN)

name: Steve Chabot
subject: IMPEACHED, now what?
body:
Today’s Democrats have gone to a whole new extreme. Just when we thought they couldn’t get further to the left, today’s Democrats are now calling for widespread socialism, universal healthcare, the Green New Deal, slavery reparations, open borders, and even infanticide.

No images? Click here https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-e-jhmuulk-kujkulhluu-a/

Friend,

IT’S OFFICIAL: Speaker Pelosi has finally decided to send the sham articles of impeachment over to the Senate today.

I know that by now you’re aware, but after the Democratic House voted to impeach our president, with no evidence, Nancy Pelosi decided to hold on to the articles for ALMOST A MONTH claiming she needed to “see that the Senate would hold a fair trial,” after the House did the exact opposite.

It was more shameful partisan gamesmanship from Speaker Pelosi... Friend, I’m calling on you now to help us show them that our base is ready to go on offense and that we are united in defense of our president by chipping in $20 now.

DO YOU STILL STAND WITH THE PRESIDENT? [https://secure.winred.com/steve-chabot/donate?utm_medium=email&utm_source=hf_m&utm_campaign=oh01chabot_954253_20200115_articles_steve_hfm&utm_content=1_2]

The articles are now moving to the Senate where Trump should be swiftly and fully acquitted.

Friend, do you realize that this is only the THIRD time in our nation’s history that a president has been impeached? Third time in 243 years.

Before our duly-elected president was even sworn in, the far Left decided they wanted Donald Trump impeached without ANY REASON. It’s time that we show the Democrats that our base is stronger than EVER.

This is it. We are down to the wire. Friend, I need you to show me that you’re still committed to our President, that you’re still committed to our nation. [https://secure.winred.com/steve-chabot/donate?utm_medium=email&utm_source=hf_m&utm_campaign=oh01chabot_954253_20200115_articles_steve_hfm&utm_content=2_2]

- Rep. Steve Chabot

6613 Glenway Ave, Cincinnati, OH 45211 You are receiving this email because of your connection to our cause. If you receive this email in error, please use the unsubscribe link below and remove yourself from future mailings. name: Jill Vogel
subject: Legislative Update January
disclaimer_text: Paid for and Authorized by Vogel for Senate 45 North Hill Drive, Suite 100 Warrenton, VA 20186
clean_body: The 2020 Senate Session convened January 8th at the Capitol in Richmond for the 401st year. | | | | | | | | | | Senator Jill H. Vogel Legislative Update January 15, 2020 The 2020 Senate Session convened January 8th at the Capitol in Richmond for the 401st year. All 140 members of the new General Assembly were sworn in, the House and Senate reorganized under new Democratic leadership, and Governor Northam gave his State of the Commonwealth address. Committee assignments were announced and for the next four years I will serve on the Senate Finance and Appropriations Committee, General Laws and Technology Committee, Rules Committee, Privileges and Elections Committee; Joint House/Senate Rules Committee and Finance subcommittees on General Laws, Health and Human Resources and Claims. Senate Finance is my most significant responsibility as this session the committee crafts an entirely new 2-year budget for the Commonwealth. In the months preceding session, I met with local governments, public safety officials, school boards, supervisors, civic organizations, and community advocates in each of the seven jurisdictions in the 27th District. Many of their requests are part of my current legislation. A partial list of bills that I have introduced includes: Improved treatment protocols for substance use-related emergencies; Creation of higher education work group and implementation of teaching practices for dyslexia and literacy, multisensory structured language education; Opioid access reduction through home hospice disposal of deceased's unused drugs left in the home; A cap on interest and fees for pay day loans; Workers compensation for firefighters with cancer diagnoses associated with toxic exposures; A Hope Card Program for permanent protective orders; Reporting of unprofessional conduct by health professionals; Amendment to the Charter of the Town of Middleburg; Speeding fines increased on certain high accident roadways in Fauquier County; Electronic speed indicator signs on U.S. Route 17; Speed limits for certain vehicles on U.S. Route 17; Workers' compensation to include PTSD for law-enforcement officers and firefighters Prompt payment by contractors to subcontractors; Music therapy licensure; Signage and road markings for cyclists; Change in rules for distillers' licenses, remote stores and tasting rooms; Increase in special event licenses permitted for localities; Increase in resources to accommodate Winchester City elected School Board; Grant funding for Acute Stabilization in Drug or Alcohol Emergencies; Additional resources for the Career Prosecutors Program; Funding for the education facility at Clermont Farm; Support for the Shihadeh Innovation Center Winchester Public Schools; Resources to provide information cards for individuals with protective orders; A 5% raise for teachers over each of the next two years; Hub for Innovation, Virtual Reality and Entrepreneurship education in the northern valley in partnership with Shenandoah University; Resources for Clerks of the Circuit Court; and * Support for the Laurel Center intervention programs for domestic and sexual violence and workforce training. This marks the first session in 26 years where Democrats have majorities in the House and Senate with a Democrat serving as Governor. It has brought an immediate change to the direction of the legislature. January 3rd, we held a pre-session public forum for people in the region to address the budget and other matters. Large numbers turned out to advocate for budget revisions, while others testified about the dangers of extreme anti-business, high tax and anti-Second Amendment legislation currently proposed. That day I listened to almost six hours of testimony from my constituents. It was just a wind up to the frenzy that we see at the Capitol now from those upset by rules already passed this week. Many of us are working very hard to address these issues and prevail upon our colleagues to reject these proposals that so offend our citizens. These are not partisan issues, but Virginia issues and those communicating concerns cross party lines and represent the views of ordinary Virginians. We welcome your feedback on any matters and also welcome visitors to the Capitol. Please contact our office any time that you have questions or concerns. I can be reached during the General Assembly session at 804-698-7527, P.O. Box 397, Richmond, VA 23218 or email at mailto:district27@senate.virginia.gov. Also, please visit our website at ==. | Sincerely, | | | ---|--- | Senator Jill Vogel | | | Paid for and Authorized by Vogel for Senate 45 North Hill Drive, Suite 100 Warrenton, VA 20186 | Follow Jill on Facebook, Twitter and Instagram Updates == == == | | Vogel for Senate | 45 North Hill Drive, Suite 100, Warrenton, VA 20186 | | Sent by mailto:info@senatorjillvogel.com in collaboration with |

Peter, **There is a lot going on in the news: Iran, impeachment, the presidential election, and more every day. It is hard to break through the noise. So, I wanted to make sure you saw that we pulled in another big endorsement — Jolt Action!**

Progressive groups in Texas and all over the country have been endorsing us because they know we are the right campaign to finish the job. Jolt Action, the largest Latino progressive organization in Texas, focused on building the political power and influence of young Latinos, came out in support of our race. They know that it is going to take bold action to fix the problems we are facing as a country. With organizations like theirs behind us we can flip this district and create real progressive change in Congress.

**[Can you commit to donating $5, $10, or $20 bucks to our campaign right now?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/13967536/145833908/203122784?refcode=em011619&recurring=1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82MzkwNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiZTg5OWM4Yi03ZDM4LWVhMTEtYTFjYy0yODE4Nzg0ZDA4NGYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=gMdx6IpoOO9rJLVu3RRgOZybKYri9DRsPhqGUdHp_kw=)**

Last election we came closer than anyone had to flipping this seat. We fought hard to make the gains we needed and held McCaul to just 51% of the vote — just within striking distance.

We are going to win this race by mobilizing voters who historically have been marginalized. Our campaign has always understood that we can’t make real change if we talk to the same people who vote in every election. Texas is not a red state — Texas is a non-voting state. We are working to change that.

**[We are building a winning coalition of powerful movements that will flip this district but we need your help. Help us make real change here in the Texas 10th! clean_body: Peter, There is a lot going on in the news: Iran, impeachment, the presidential election, and more every day. It is hard to break through the noise. So, I wanted to make sure you saw that we pulled in another big endorsement — Jolt Action! Progressive groups in Texas and all over the country have been endorsing us because they know we are the right campaign to finish the job. Jolt Action, the largest Latino progressive organization in Texas, focused on building the political power and influence of young Latinos, came out in support of our race. They know that it is going to take bold action to fix the problems we are facing as a country. With organizations like theirs behind us we can flip this district and create real progressive change in Congress. = = = = Last election we came closer than anyone had to flipping this seat. We fought hard to make the gains we needed and held McCaul to just 51% of the vote — just within striking distance. We are going to win this race by mobilizing voters who historically have been marginalized. Our campaign has always understood that we can’t make real change if we talk to the same people who vote in every election. Texas is not a red state — Texas is a non-voting state. We are working to change that. = = Fighting for you, Mike Siegel ** = PO Box 2409 Austin, TX 78701

body:
Senator Cornyn just released a new digital ad -- from here on out, he'll be on screens all across Texas -- so we need to act quickly to respond!

|

| | Hey Peter,

Senator Cornyn has already launched the first TV ads of this campaign. And he just released a new digital ad -- from here on out, he'll be on screens all across Texas -- so we need to act quickly to respond! It's proof he knows he's in trouble, and he knows he can be beaten. **[Can you pitch in to our Rapid Response Fund?](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64890757/7f51f7bc/4a82d4e3/4ef01f2a/1738230331/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6Ijc2OSJ9/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-lessthan1yr?refcode=20200116.1nd__769__&amount=10&recurring=true")**

**So we 're setting up a Rapid Response Fund to make sure we can spread MJ's message of a Texas that works for all of us to every corner of the state.** | _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_

name: Mike Thompson
subject: Only Congress can declare war
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Mike Thompson For Congress
body:
Peter,

Over the past weeks, the President has deliberately escalated tensions with Iran, including killing one of its top generals. These actions have made us less safe, putting our servicemembers and diplomats abroad at risk. Iran has also restarted its nuclear program.

That's why last week, I voted to pass a war powers resolution to limit the President's military actions regarding Iran. The President's top priority must be protecting American citizens, not putting us in danger. Only Congress has the power to declare war and I remain opposed to further escalation with Iran.

Please know that I take these issues seriously, and will continue to fulfill my constitutional duties - regardless of what the President chooses to do.

Thank you,

Mike Thompson [](https://act.myngp.com/el/DXwFNQLttrblf-FOk9Qf-Az47jI-1v3FmpUMuzWbFTU=/yoHhwXl3YHL4s3noNs4OS_BCsd5jQ-lqPcPj0whQ53M=) [](https://act.myngp.com/el/DXwFNQLttrblf-FOk9Qf-Az47jI-1v3FmpUMuzWbFTU=/YlQY4mZRFyWTVfNp8bzGjVlMfs08DDFCFxc-3TUMBO8=)

* * *
_Mike Thompson is a veteran and a longtime public servant. He represents California 's 5th district in Congress, where he fights for our healthcare and a clean environment every day. He cannot continue to do his crucial work without the support of people like you. [**Consider making a donation of any amount now.**](https://act.myngp.com/el/DXwFNQLttrblf-FOk9Qf-Az47jI-1v3FmpUMuzWbFTU=/F3UPAYafNqxRUcy89w5gAAoeHWcd-Cv5vXD3F8Txrdk=?amount=15&recurring=true&refcode=MT_EM_FR_WL_191018_1_2&firstname=%7B%7BFirstName,DefaultTo=%7D%7D&lastname=%7B%7BLastName,DefaultTo=%7D%7D&addr1=%7B%7BAddressLine1,DefaultTo=%7D%7D&addr2=%7B%7BAddressLine2,DefaultTo=%7D%7D&email=%7B%7BRecipientEmailAddress,DefaultTo=%7D%7D&zip=%7B%7BZipCode,DefaultTo=%7D%7D&city=%7B%7BCity,DefaultTo=%7D%7D&state=%7B%7BState,DefaultTo=%7D%7D&phone=%7B%7BPhoneNumber,DefaultTo=%7D%7D&occupation=%7B%7BOccupation,DefaultTo=%7D%7D&employer=%7B%7BEmployer,DefaultTo=%7D%7D)_

name: Gov. Mike Huckabee
subject: It’s not horizontal, it’s a vertical issue. Let me explain...
body:
Peter,
The first weeks of 2020 have been busy news weeks, to put it mildly.
* America killed terrorist Qassem Soleimani, the top Iranian military commander and one of the evilest men of our generation, yet Hollywood and the media rushed to his defense.
* A shooter opened fire on West Freeway Church of Christ in Texas, and if it wasn’t for an armed member of the congregation responding in six seconds, far more people would have died.
* The abortion numbers from 2019 made headlines, a staggering forty-two million babies were killed worldwide in 2019.

I’ve stated before, these are societal sins and for far too long, we have failed to recognize the root cause. It’s not about politics; it’s not about Democrats or Republicans, liberals or conservatives; in fact, it’s not horizontal at all; it’s a vertical issue. It’s not left or right; it’s up or down.
It’s about whether we live by God’s standards, or by our own. Who will recognize this? And more importantly, who will take this truth and act on it? **[We need your help to advance God’s standards in 2020](https://secured.myfaithvotes.org/p200116apl01?e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e200116apl01nd&n=1).**
**Peter, it must be us. We have to bring the truth of God’s Word into our churches, schools, business, and yes, the voting booth.**
Our culture has rejected moral absolutes. While it may be politically incorrect, sin is real and evil exists. When our culture touts the killing of a million babies a year in the U.S. and defends a terrorist who murdered thousands, we create a little piece of hell right here on earth.
**It’s critical for us to mobilize Christians to stand up and be heard. We can’t afford to be silent and indifferent. In 2020 we have the potential to unleash Christian principles and truth on our nation like never before.**
At My Faith Votes, we are leveraging leading Christian voices to rise above partisan politics and boldly advance biblical truth. We will run a national media campaign utilizing radio, television, social media and online advertisements. We’re providing voting assistance and voter guides covering all 100,000 elections. We’re activating churches and Christian universities across the nation - **but all of this is only possible with your help.**
We must unite to bring hope and healing to our culture by awakening Christians to stand for truth. We are a nation in need of God, not just more government.
**[Please make a donation today towards our efforts](https://secured.myfaithvotes.org/p200116apl01?e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e200116apl01nd&n=2).** I hope I can count on you now and every month until November. Together, we will make a lasting difference in our society.
I can see 2020 clearly and with you standing with us. And for that, I’m hopeful!
[Donate to Fight Evil & Advance Truth](https://secured.myfaithvotes.org/p200116apl01?e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e200116apl01nd&n=3)
---
**United. We Stand.**
Gov. Mike Huckabee
Honorary National Chairman
[](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=FvZODUdzRCV4_QVEoUI5Y_LYDGbWPUdf00keax2EMv8&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e200116apl01nd&n=4)
©2020 My Faith Votes
10940 S Parker, 640, Parker, CO 80134
This email was sent to [dpwillis67@gmail.com](mailto:dpwillis67@gmail.com).
To stop receiving emails, [click here](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/unsubscribe?e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e200116apl01nd&n=5).

| [**SIGN** ON](https://secure.314action.%3D/?g=v87XQ8Qot1BdKB-_uknky5A "https://secure.314action.org/page/s/leave-roe-alone?firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&city=&state=&phone=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=naughton&utm_content=2+-+SIGN+ON&utm_campaign=314_EM_PT_30OP_200116_1_2&source=314_EM_PT_30OP_200116_1_2&refcode=314_EM_PT_30OP_200116_1_2")
---
* * *
[200 Republican members of Congress just asked the Supreme Court to overturn the landmark 1973 _Roe v. Wade_ abortion rights decision.](https://secure.314action.%3D/?g=v87XQ8Qot1BdKB-_uknky5A "https://secure.314action.org/page/s/leave-roe-alone?firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&city=&state=&phone=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=naughton&utm_content=3+-+200+Republican+members+of+Congress+just+&utm_campaign=314_EM_PT_30OP_200116_1_2&source=314_EM_PT_30OP_200116_1_2&refcode=314_EM_PT_30OP_200116_1_2")

The GOP knows that with Justices Kavanaugh and Gorsuch on the Court, _Roe v. Wade_ has never been more vulnerable -- so they're pushing like never before.

**Here at 314 Action, we 're fighting back by electing more scientists to office that will make women's health and basic science a priority, and stop these attacks on women's health.**

[That's why we need your help NOW. Can you click here and add your name to show the Supreme Court how many Americans want to leave _Roe_ alone?](https://secure.314action.%3D/?g=v87XQ8Qot1BdKB-_uknky5A "https://secure.314action.org/page/s/leave-roe-alone?firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&city=&state=&phone=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=naughton&utm_content=4+-+Thatrsquos+why+we+need+your+help+NOW+Can&utm_campaign=314_EM_PT_30OP_200116_1_2&source=314_EM_PT_30OP_200116_1_2&refcode=314_EM_PT_30OP_200116_1_2")
| [SIGN NOW](https://secure.314action.%3D/?g=v87XQ8Qot1BdKB-_uknky5A "https://secure.314action.org/page/s/leave-roe-alone?firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&city=&state=&phone=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=naughton&utm_content=5+-+SIGN+NOW&utm_campaign=314_EM_PT_30OP_200116_1_2&source=314_EM_PT_30OP_200116_1_2&refcode=314_EM_PT_30OP_200116_1_2")
---
Already, restrictions to American women's early access to medical care are pushing abortions later and later, making them more dangerous.

This will be the Supreme Court's first time hearing a case on abortion rights with Justice Brett Kavanaugh on the bench. **If the court sides with pro-lifers, people 's access to abortion services will be eliminated in many states across the country.**

[That is why we need you to click here and add your name to join us and fight back. Sign on now!](https://secure.314action.%3D/?g=v87XQ8Qot1BdKB-_uknky5A "https://secure.314action.org/page/s/leave-roe-alone?firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&city=&state=&phone=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=naughton&utm_content=6+-+That+is+why+we+need+you+to+click+here+an&utm_campaign=314_EM_PT_30OP_200116_1_2&source=314_EM_PT_30OP_200116_1_2&refcode=314_EM_PT_30OP_200116_1_2")
| [SIGN ON](https://secure.314action.%3D/?g=v87XQ8Qot1BdKB-_uknky5A "https://secure.314action.org/page/s/leave-roe-alone?firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&city=&state=&phone=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=naughton&utm_content=7+-+SIGN+ON&utm_campaign=314_EM_PT_30OP_200116_1_2&source=314_EM_PT_30OP_200116_1_2&refcode=314_EM_PT_30OP_200116_1_2")
---
Thank you for doing your part to stand for reproductive health.

-- 314Action.org

Paid for by 314 Action Fund, 314action.org, not authorized by any candidate or any candidate's committee.
---

**[Click here to unsubscribe from 314 Action's email list.](https://secure.314action.org/page/m/29bb4075/4bd7760e/46fbf1fd/77ace865/2081624835/VEsO/p/eyJKU1ZQUWtaVlUwTkJWRVZFVWtWRFNWQkpSVTVVU1VRbEpRPT0iOiI0NmZiZjFmZCIsIkpTVlBRa1pWVTBOQlZFVkVUVUZKVEVsT1IxTkZUa1JKUkNVbCI6IjI5YmI0MDc1In0%3D/?g=v87XQ8Qot1BdKB-_uknky5A "https://secure.314action.org/page/oneclickunsubscribe/46fbf1fd/29bb4075?utm_medium=email&utm_source=naughton&utm_content=8+-+Click+here+to++unsubscribe+from+314+Acti&utm_campaign=314_EM_PT_30OP_200116_1_2&source=314_EM_PT_30OP_200116_1_2&refcode=314_EM_PT_30OP_200116_1_2")**

314 Action is a grassroots community of over 1 million people working to elect Democratic scientists who will use science and facts to address some of our most pressing issues like climate change and health care. In 2018 we played a pivotal role in flipping the US House of Representatives by electing 9 Democratic scientists to the House and Senate as well as over 100 to key legislative districts while raising over $5.2 million with an average donation of just $27.55. Now we're focused on flipping the US Senate, defeating 25 climate deniers in Congress and flipping key state legislatures across the country.

If you'd like to support 314 Action, you can **[click here](https://secure.314action.org/page/m/29bb4075/4bd7760e/46fbf1fd/77ace864/2081624835/VEsP/?g=v87XQ8Qot1BdKB-_uknky5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/314-emfooter?refcode=emfooter&utm_medium=email&utm_source=naughton&utm_content=9+-+click+here&utm_campaign=314_EM_PT_30OP_200116_1_2&source=314_EM_PT_30OP_200116_1_2")** to make a donation.

name: Impeachment Alert
subject: Should Trump be removed?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Democratic Governors Association
body:
| | |
---
| | **Breaking: Nancy Pelosi sends articles of impeachment to Senate; trial to begin shortly**
---
**Team, should President Trump be removed from office?**
---
| | | [YES](http://links.dga.mkt6018.com/ctt?kn=8&ms=MTY4MzY1NzUS1&r=NDgzNzk3NjA4NzczS0&b=0&j=MTgwMTAwMDIzNwS2&mt=1&rt=0)
---

---
Team: The House just voted to send the articles of impeachment to the Senate.
Since the first day of his presidency, Trump has gotten away with one corrupt act after another. Now that impeachment has reached the Senate, we have a chance to finally hold him accountable. But it won't happen if Democrats don't speak up.
**With Donald Trump 's trial set to begin next week, we need to know where grassroots Democrats stand. We're conducting a time-sensitive impeachment poll in 34223 - but we're still 17 responses short, and we haven't heard from you yet. **
**Tell us before midnight: **
| | **11:59 P.M. DEADLINE**
---
**Should President Trump be removed from office?**
---
| | | [YES](http://links.dga.mkt6018.com/ctt?kn=4&ms=MTY4MzY1NzUS1&r=NDgzNzk3NjA4NzczS0&b=0&j=MTgwMTAwMDIzNwS2&mt=1&rt=0)

name: Ryan Furlong
subject: I know you're probably sick of these emails
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tina Smith for Minnesota
body:
We cannot afford to miss our first fundraising deadline of 2020 if we want any chance of holding strong in Minnesota and protecting Tina's seat.

| [](https://action.tinaforminnesota.%3D/?g=YCjTcDpTVzRarKyUt8_RZpA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tsm-em200116-mm10?refcode=em200116-mm10&recurring=yes&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&employer=&occupation=&amount=10") Real quick, folks --

I know you're probably sick of these emails by now. But here's why we keep sending them:

Minnesota is a must-win seat if Democrats want to take back the Senate next year. Without us, the majority is in serious jeopardy of staying in the GOP's hands. What makes things worse is that Trump is pledging to dump $30 million into our state to win -- and our Republican opponent will benefit a lot from that.

As you may know, Tina just won her Special Election in 2018, which means she is the only Senate Democrat who has to campaign back-to-back like this. We need to build a winning organization all over again in a much shorter time period than the rest of the Democratic field.

In other words, we cannot afford to miss our first fundraising deadline of 2020 if we want any chance of holding strong in Minnesota and protecting Tina's seat.

**Look, we all know how important this race is. So please, pitch in anything you can afford before our first deadline of 2020 expires at midnight. subject: before midnight
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Bennet for America
body:
| |
---
| Friends - I'm going to be completely honest with you.

I didn't think things would come this close to the wire.

Tonight is our deadline to reach our $700,000 goal for the New Hampshire Investment Strategy, and we're still **$58,953** short.

Voters in New Hampshire are more undecided today than they were six weeks ago or six months ago.

[I can't do this without you, team. That's why I'm asking you directly to make your first donation of any amount.](https://secure.michaelbennet.com/page/m/35cbabf5/134673f2/812b3e9/699777cd/1576014778/VEsH/?g=GUSlGlH8x8Vcy9-bgCeB4mA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/nhinvestment?refcode=EM_FR_B1_011620_AC_ND&recurring=auto&amount=1&amounts=10,29,50,100,250,500,1000")

I've never had a billionaire's bank account or celebrity status to power me this far in the race - but I have had the support of grassroots donors like you, team.

Can I count on you to make your first donation before midnight?](https://secure.michaelbennet.com/page/m/35cbabf5/134673f2/812b3e9/699777cd/1576014778/VEsE/?g=GUSlGlH8x8Vcy9-bgCeB4mA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/nhinvestment?refcode=EM_FR_B1_011620_AC_ND&recurring=auto&amount=1&amounts=10,29,50,100,250,500,1000")

| | | [](https://secure.petersformichigan.com/page/m/7b6da967/5721a3ed/70394370/efb59ef/1954936635/VEsH/?g=SkKTSlNw52hcsC2e00JiNrA "https://petersformichigan.com/")

Friend - Despite unprecedented support for our campaign in Michigan, my extreme right-wing GOP opponent just announced he has broken fundraising records and outraised us for the second straight reporting period.

This is thanks to Donald Trump funneling MILLIONS into Michigan to defeat me and buy this seat to expand Mitch McConnell's majority in the Senate.
**So truthfully, friend, this news couldn't have come at a better time: After hearing we were outraised by our opponent, a group of donors just offered to match all donations up to our $25,000 goal - but only today!**
I'm counting on supporters like you to take full advantage of this incredible match before it's too late, friend: [**Please rush $3 or more now - before this match expires at midnight - and have every dollar DOUBLED to defend Michigan's Senate seat and take back the Senate for Democrats.**](https://secure.petersformichigan.com/page/m/7b6da967/5721a3ed/70394370/efb59ee/1954936635/VEsE/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5IjoicGV0ZXJzX2VtYWlsIiwiZTNzZ2NtVm1ZMjlrWlNCOWZRPT0iOiJqdGsyNTItZnItaW4tbmQiLCJlM3NnVEZCQlFWRjFaWEo1VTNSeWFXNW5JSDE5IjoiMywyNSw1MCwxMDAsMjUwLDUwMCIsImUzc2dZV0p5WldOMWNuSnBibWNnZlgwPSI6IiZyZWN1cnJpbmc9MSJ9/?g=SkKTSlNw52hcsC2e00JiNrA "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/peters_email?refcode=jtk252-fr-in-nd&amounts=3,25,50,100,250,500&recurring=1")
We can't afford any more years of a Republican Senate - they've already confirmed two extreme right-wing justices to the Supreme Court and threatened to dismantle affordable health care. It's never been more important for Democrats to win back the Senate majority.

**Friend, here 's the good news: Nate Silver's FiveThirtyEight reports Democrats can take back the Senate. ****_But first we have to win here in Michigan._**

Right now, recent polling shows me TIED - and in a race this close, every single dollar matters. If we're going to win and take back the Senate, we cannot fall further behind. This rare match opportunity is only on the table until midnight tonight, so I'm counting on you to take full advantage before it's too late.
[**What we do right now could be the difference between winning and losing. Please, will you rush $3 or more - whatever you give right now will be DOUBLED, dollar for dollar - to win in Michigan, take back the Senate for Democrats and protect the future of the Supreme Court?**](https://secure.petersformichigan.com/page/m/7b6da967/5721a3ed/70394370/efb59ee/1954936635/VEsF/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5IjoicGV0ZXJzX2VtYWlsIiwiZTNzZ2NtVm1ZMjlrWlNCOWZRPT0iOiJqdGsyNTItZnItaW4tbmQiLCJlM3NnVEZCQlFWRjFaWEo1VTNSeWFXNW5JSDE5IjoiMywyNSw1MCwxMDAsMjUwLDUwMCIsImUzc2dZV0p5WldOMWNuSnBibWNnZlgwPSI6IiZyZWN1cnJpbmc9MSJ9/?g=SkKTSlNw52hcsC2e00JiNrA "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/peters_email?refcode=jtk252-fr-in-nd&amounts=3,25,50,100,250,500&recurring=1")

disclaimer_text: Paid for by When Democrats Turn Out PAC
body:
|

| | In an exclusive interview with Rachel Maddow, Lev Parnas broke his silence for the first time in the impeachment proceedings, saying, "President Trump knew exactly what was going on" in Ukraine. "He was aware of all my movements. I wouldn't do anything without the consent of Rudy Giuliani, or the president. I have no intent, I have no reason to speak to any of these officials," Parnas told Maddow. And John Bolton says he'll testify in the Senate trial if subpoenaed. But Mitch McConnell has repeatedly said he's coordinating with the White House, that the impeachment is a sham, and Democrats should have NO SAY in a fair trial, and McConnell is STILL REFUSING to call ANY witnesses in the Senate impeachment trial. name: Sara Gideon for U.S. Senate
subject: Lev Parnas
body:
Trump knew about the quid pro quo.
# [](https://gideon.bsd.net/page/m/65802e97/4bef7a87/6ada0ef3/287f81c2/3039972574/VEsH/?g=siAzLVH8x8VdU6OjQM8XC0A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sg-email-template?refcode=em_header")

Friend --
Last night, Rudy Giuliani's associate Lev Parnas went on _Maddow_ and shared information about President Trump's, Vice-President Mike Pence's, and Attorney General Barr's involvement in the quid pro quo with Ukraine.
This interview was a bombshell! Parnas said Trump knew about everything that was going on in Ukraine and encouraged it because all he cared about was winning in 2020.
**But when asked if new evidence from Parnas had affected her views on the need for witnesses and evidence, Collins instead "threw cold water" on the stunning new evidence, and criticized the House's impeachment process.**
Despite new revelations, Collins is still backing McConnell in moving forward with **_no guarantee_** of witnesses or additional evidence.

name: Election Security Update (via MarkWarnerVA.com)
subject: Do you think our elections are safe? [Yes/No]
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Mark Warner
body:
We must take firm, measured steps to secure our elections immediately. Not next year. Not next month. Now.
|
---
| | **Free and fair elections are the cornerstone of our democracy, Derek.**

When those elections come under attack by foreign powers seeking to influence our government for their own purposes, we have a responsibility to stop them. Mark has fought fiercely to secure our electoral process from foreign attacks, but the fight isn't over.

**[If you've got a few spare minutes, will you fill out Mark's survey on election security? Here's the first question:](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85d6b7/53d9897e/5354470c/1c89d445/1754888016/VEsH/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/s/warner-election")** | [](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85d6b7/53d9897e/5354470c/1c89d445/1754888016/VEsE/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/s/warner-election")
---
Mark has repeatedly introduced bipartisan election security legislation in the Senate but **Senate GOP leadership has refused to allow a vote on Mark 's bills**, including the Foreign Influence Reporting in Elections (FIRE) Act. This legislation would help safeguard our elections by requiring presidential campaigns to report foreign contacts to the FBI.

Let's be clear: the kind of foreign interference that happened in 2016 _will_ happen again. Adversaries like China, Iran, and North Korea are all following the Russian playbook, and failing to protect our elections would be ignoring one of our most basic responsibilities to the American people.

**We must take firm, measured steps to secure our elections immediately. Not next year. Not next month. Now.**
**[Take Mark 's election security survey](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85d6b7/53d9897e/5354470c/1c89d445/1754888016/VEsF/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/s/warner-election")**
---
-- Team Warner

**[CONTRIBUTE](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85d6b7/53d9897e/5354470c/1c89d444/1754888016/VEsC/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjQyOCJ9/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/warner-election?refcode=20200116_s_1_fl__428__&refcode2=cont&amount=5")**
---

|
---

Williamsburg, VA 23185

name: Team Warren
subject: Can you make your first contribution? Anything you can chip in would make a huge difference.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Warren for President
body:
Elizabeth isn't holding any fundraisers where you can only get in by writing a big check -- because a person's wealth shouldn't allow them... | | | [](https://my.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/2852a452/45c30650/1ed71492c/66ffbbf1/3458004152/VEsH/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVm1hWEp6ZEc1aGJXVWxKUT09IjoiIiwiSlNWc1lYTjBibUZ0WlNVbCI6IiIsIkpTVjZhWEFsSlE9PSI6IjE4MzI2In0%3D/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://elizabethwarren.com?source=em-header&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&zip=18326")
---
There's only one way we're raising money for this campaign.

1. Elizabeth isn't holding any fundraisers where you can only get in by writing a big check -- because a person's wealth shouldn't allow them to buy access to her time -- or any presidential candidate's time.

2. She's not counting on a billionaire to fund a Super PAC for her -- because the Democratic primary can't just be one more tool for the rich and powerful.

3. She's not taking a dime from federally registered lobbyists, corporate PACs, or PACs of any kind -- because our campaign is about people, not powerful special interests.

**Instead, we're building a true grassroots campaign with grassroots donors like you -- because that's the only way we'll create a movement strong enough to make big, structural change in our economy, our government, and our democracy.**

But we'll be honest: We were outraised by some of the other candidates last quarter, and that means this month's fundraising is our last chance to close the gap and demonstrate the strength of this grassroots movement. So we're asking:

**[Can you make your first contribution? $2 or whatever you can chip in would make a huge difference. Elizabeth can't do this without you.](https://my.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/2852a452/45c30650/1ed71492c/66ffbbf0/3458004152/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsImUzc2dkWEpzSUgxOSI6ImV3LWphbjIwZnItMy0zIiwiZTNzZ2NtVm1ZMjlrWlNCOWZRPT0iOiJFTU42OEZfRUdSX05GRl9UXzIwMjAwMTE2X1YxUzNfUCJ9/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://secure.elizabethwarren.com/donate/ew-jan20fr-3-3?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&refcode=EMN68F_EGR_NFF_T_20200116_V1S3_P")**

clean_body: Elizabeth isn't holding any fundraisers where you can only get in by writing a big check -- because a person's wealth shouldn't allow them... | | | "" There's only one way we're raising money for this campaign. 1. Elizabeth isn't holding any fundraisers where you can only get in by writing a big check -- because a person's wealth shouldn't allow them to buy access to her time -- or any presidential candidate's time. 2. She's not counting on a billionaire to fund a Super PAC for her -- because the Democratic primary can't just be one more tool for the rich and powerful. 3. She's not taking a dime from federally registered lobbyists, corporate PACs, or PACs of any kind -- because our campaign is about people, not powerful special interests. Instead, we're building a true grassroots campaign with grassroots donors like you -- because that's the only way we'll create a movement strong enough to make big, structural change in our economy, our government, and our democracy. But we'll be honest: We were outraised by some of the other candidates last quarter, and that means this month's fundraising is our last chance to close the gap and demonstrate the strength of this grassroots movement. So we're asking: "" | If you've saved payment info with ActBlue Express, your donation will process automatically: | | | | "" | "" | | "" | "" | | "" | "" Thanks for everything you do, Team Warren "" | | | "" | "" | "" | "" | "" | "" ---|---|---|---|---|--- | Paid for by Warren for President All content (C) 2020 Warren for President, All Rights Reserved PO Box 171375, Boston, MA 02117

body:
| |

| | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/13979024/145942072/-760261259?refcode=em011620-header&refcode2=00427a7d-ac38-ea11-a1cc-2818784d084f&noskip=true&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NDI2NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwMDQyN2E3ZC1hYzM4LWVhMTEtYTFjYy0yODE4Nzg0ZDA4NGYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=7hUra11nIyK39_e2izHwLlQrZgscZNEVenCXCfNklwY=) **** | | Team, CNN asked David Perdue point-blank on camera about Donald Trump’s impeachment trial given this week’s groundbreaking new evidence. body:
This group has been on the frontlines of keeping Texas a free and fair state. | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/1820e5bfef93/im-running-for-texas-house-12131737?e=4f010155df)
---
| | [ ](https://willdouglasfortexas.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=f04ec3916ea34d520e31df9fc&id=5daf9b670f&e=4f010155df)
---
| | Peter,

I'm excited to announce that Texans for Lawsuit Reform PAC endorsed my candidacy for HD 113 today!

TLRPAC is the political arm of Texans for Lawsuit Reform (TLR), the largest civil justice reform organization in Texas that works tirelessly to ensure that Texas' legal climate stays business and family friendly.

“TLRPAC supports candidates who understand what it takes to keep Texas’ economy strong and the need for a fair and efficient legal system in our state,” TLRPAC Chairman Richard J. Trabulsi Jr. said.

“Will Douglas is a dynamic and successful young pharmacist and entrepreneur with a passion for serving his community. He is focused on protecting the strong economic environment that allows families and job creators to thrive, and is committed to shutting down job-killing lawsuit abuse whenever and wherever it occurs. TLRPAC is proud to support him.”

Thank you so much to this important group for giving us their vote of confidence. Our campaign has incredible momentum as we kick off the new year, but we still need your help in order to fight Rhetta Bowers' far-left war chest.

[**Will you donate just $5 to our campaign today to help us power our campaign, beat Rhetta Bowers in November, and keep Texas the #1 state to raise a family and start a business?**](https://willdouglasfortexas.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=f04ec3916ea34d520e31df9fc&id=f51bd2dcd3&e=4f010155df)

Thank you for helping us in our fight for Texas values.

For Texas,
[](https://willdouglasfortexas.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=f04ec3916ea34d520e31df9fc&id=9a8dd78761&e=4f010155df)
Will Douglas

name: =?utf-8?Q?The=20White=20House?=
subject: Trump's Phase One China Trade Deal Result of Negotiator-in-Chief's Courage
body:
"Wednesday, President Trump signed the much-anticipated ‘Phase One’ trade agreement with China after months of hard-fought negotiations." | | | | [ ](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=8619f9dcf4&e=3ee4985eea)
---
| | |
# **Trump's Phase One China Trade Deal Result of Negotiator-in-Chief's Courage**
“President Trump signed the much-anticipated ‘Phase One’ trade agreement with China after months of hard-fought negotiations,” Rep. Jodey Arrington (R-TX) writes in Fox Business. “This is a monumental achievement for farmers and ranchers in my district in West Texas and across rural America, who will reap the blessings of China’s commitment to purchasing as much as $50 billion worth of U.S. agriculture products. This is nearly 100 percent more than the largest amount of U.S. commodities purchased by China since normalizing relations in the 1970s.” How did it happen? “For decades, as a result of political short-sightedness and economic expediency, policymakers have acquiesced to Communist-controlled China . . . At this critical juncture in history, we are fortunate to have a Negotiator-in-Chief who understands that China is the biggest existential threat to America and, more importantly, who has the political courage to do something about it.” [Click here to read more.](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=30840de10d&e=3ee4985eea)
---
|
---
| “The Senate can now do better by the Constitution by holding a trial that judges President Trump without validating the partisan House process and its weak case . . . The House hearings blocked GOP witnesses and limited cross-examination. Despite selective leaks and a pro-impeachment media, they failed to move public opinion,” [_The Wall Street Journal_](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=086bcd7dcb&e=3ee4985eea) editorial board writes.
---
|
---
| “The Dow Jones Industrial Average closed above 29000 for the first time Wednesday after President Trump signed an initial trade pact with China . . . Both the Dow and the S&P closed at records, while the Nasdaq is within 0.2% of Monday’s high,” Alexander Osipovich and Avantika Chilkoti report in [_The Wall Street Journal_](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=0cb7a110cd&e=3ee4985eea).
---
|
---
| Speaker Nancy Pelosi (D-CA) handed out commemorative pens to her impeachment managers yesterday—a ceremonial act typically reserved for landmark legislation—while posing for photos. The scene undermined the tone of “proceedings she has said should be serious and somber,” Cameron Cawthorne reports for [_The Washington Free Beacon_](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=da40a4ecb8&e=3ee4985eea) _._

---
|

[Privacy Policy](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=25992564a4&e=3ee4985eea) | [Contact the White House](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=2ac46a8ba6&e=3ee4985eea) | [Unsubscribe](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=8cafb01033&e=3ee4985eea&c=22d0436a13)
---
| | | The White House * 1600 Pennsylvania Ave NW * Washington, DC 20500 * USA · 202-456-1111
---

name: Ben Salango
subject: We just filed to run. Now it’s time to focus on replacing Jim Justice with a true leader who cares.
body:
It’s official - I’m running for Governor.
Team,
**I’ve officially filed to run for governor of West Virginia.**
I’m stepping up to run for governor because West Virginia needs new leadership. Our state is losing population, there aren’t enough jobs, the roads are falling apart, and the opioid crisis is out of control. I’ll be a governor who will always put West Virginia first because for me it’s about public service, not self-service.
**Today marks a new chapter in our campaign -- and we’re happy you can be part of it.** [**Pitch in just $25 to join our campaign to unseat Jim Justice and build a better future for all West Virginians.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/13980132/145956436/2012225083?refcode=em_filing_011620_link1&amount=25&recurring=1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83ODgzOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5YTA0MjQ4Yy1iMjM4LWVhMTEtYTFjYy0yODE4Nzg0ZDA4NGYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ZOMNtbOZmrdDACMymkHHc2ptr3v5hKegeO83LUVIyHo=)
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/13980133/145956437/2012225083?refcode=em_filing_011620_image&amount=25&recurring=1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83ODgzOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5YTA0MjQ4Yy1iMjM4LWVhMTEtYTFjYy0yODE4Nzg0ZDA4NGYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ZOMNtbOZmrdDACMymkHHc2ptr3v5hKegeO83LUVIyHo=)
I’ve fought for the little guy my entire career. I’m in this race to get things done for West Virginia’s working families. As Kanawha County Commissioner, I focused on diversifying the economy through sports tourism, turning the unemployed into entrepreneurs, and making Kanawha County better for us all. **Now, more than ever, we need a forward-thinking leader to fix West Virginia.**
Today is the day that a kid who grew up in a two-bedroom trailer kicks off a campaign to defeat a deadbeat billionaire. I wasn’t born with a silver spoon in my mouth. I’ve earned everything I have through hard work and determination, and I will work just as hard to earn the trust of West Virginians in 2020.
I love West Virginia and I know that we can reach our full potential if we have a governor who actually shows up to work every day and fights for the people. **I'm ready to fight for you and move West Virginia forward. But now I need your help to defeat the deadbeat billionaire sitting in the Governor’s Mansion.**
[**Pitch in just $25 to help us bring real leadership back to West Virginia.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/13980134/145956438/2012225083?refcode=em_filing_011620_link2&amount=25&recurring=1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83ODgzOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5YTA0MjQ4Yy1iMjM4LWVhMTEtYTFjYy0yODE4Nzg0ZDA4NGYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ZOMNtbOZmrdDACMymkHHc2ptr3v5hKegeO83LUVIyHo=)
Together we will fight for a better future for West Virginia.
I’m in it to win it!
Ben Salango
Democratic Candidate for Governor
Ben Salango for WV
---
Ben Salango for West Virginia
PO Box 11650
Charleston, WV 25339
United States
Click here to [unsubscribe](https://email.ngpvan.com/unsubscribeUnique/9904248c-b238-ea11-a1cc-2818784d084f/9a04248c-b238-ea11-a1cc-2818784d084f?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83ODgzOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5YTA0MjQ4Yy1iMjM4LWVhMTEtYTFjYy0yODE4Nzg0ZDA4NGYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ZOMNtbOZmrdDACMymkHHc2ptr3v5hKegeO83LUVIyHo=&id=101419885&emailAddress=dpwillis67%40gmail.com)

name: =?utf-8?Q?Team=20LaTurner?=
subject: 🚩BREAKING: National Democrats target Kansas and Watkins
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kansans for LaTurner
body:
Nancy Pelosi’s political machine just made official what we’ve known all along. Steve Watkins puts KS02 in jeopardy of Democratic takeover. | | |
---
| [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/5a38981a952c/for-immediate-release-kansas-state-treasurer-jake-laturner-announces-candidacy-for-us-congress-6185297?e=1050d051da)
---
| | | | Friend,
In an [article released this morning](https://jakelaturner.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=e36c5b1e49908a49477cee2b3&id=1bcb861d41&e=1050d051da), the national Democrats and the DCCC have stated that they will now be targeting Kansas' 2nd congressional district for a Democrat take over _**calling Rep. Watkins a "weak Republican incumbent who barely won in 2018" that spent his first year in office "distracted by scandals". The Democrats believe there is now an opportunity for them to easily win the seat.**_

Nancy Pelosi’s political machine just made official what we’ve known all along. _Steve Watkins puts the Kansas 2 nd congressional district seat in jeopardy of Democratic takeover. _

name: SAVE USPS [via @314ActionFund.org]
subject: FIGHT BACK: Trump wants to privatize USPS
disclaimer_text: Paid for by 314 Action Fund, 314action
body:
| **LISTEN:** The United States Postal Service is a foundation of this country, our first public good. It's how MILLIONS of Americans get their most important documents and packages.

**DESPITE THIS:** The Trump administration is pushing to privatize the USPS as early as next month.

**Here is what that means:** If we don't stand up and tell Trump that enough is enough, incalculable damage could be done to our country.

[That is why: We must stand up for the USPS. We need 50,000 Americans to stand up and tell Trump to leave the Post Office alone.](https://secure.314action.%3D/?g=v87XQ8Qot1BdKB-_uknky5A "https://secure.314action.org/page/s/save-the-usps?firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&city=&state=&phone=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=naughton&utm_content=1+-+That+is+why+We+must+stand+up+for+the+USP&utm_campaign=314_EM_PT_30OP30NTLSeg1_200116_3_3&source=314_EM_PT_30OP30NTLSeg1_200116_3_3&refcode=314_EM_PT_30OP30NTLSeg1_200116_3_3")

USPS workers traverse millions of miles, successfully delivering billions of pieces of mail every year. For years, the USPS has been crippled by burdensome congressional administrative requirements intended to dismantle it.

**We cannot let this happen.**

[If you agree that our mail system CANNOT be privatized, click here and add your name now.](https://secure.314action.%3D/?g=v87XQ8Qot1BdKB-_uknky5A "https://secure.314action.org/page/s/save-the-usps?firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&city=&state=&phone=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=naughton&utm_content=4+-+If+you+agree+that+our+mail+system+CANNOT&utm_campaign=314_EM_PT_30OP30NTLSeg1_200116_3_3&source=314_EM_PT_30OP30NTLSeg1_200116_3_3&refcode=314_EM_PT_30OP30NTLSeg1_200116_3_3")

Thank you for helping to protect the USPS, postal workers and working-class jobs.

-- 314 Action Team

Paid for by 314 Action Fund, 314action.org, not authorized by any candidate or any candidate's committee.

314 Action is a grassroots community of over 1 million people working to elect Democratic scientists who will use science and facts to address some of our most pressing issues like climate change and health care. In 2018 we played a pivotal role in flipping the US House of Representatives by electing 9 Democratic scientists to the House and Senate as well as over 100 to key legislative districts while raising over $5.2 million with an average donation of just $27.55. Now we're focused on flipping the US Senate, defeating 25 climate deniers in Congress and flipping key state legislatures across the country.

name: When Democrats Turn Out
subject: GOP dark money is ruining our democracy
disclaimer_text: Paid for by When Democrats Turn Out PAC
body:
|
---

| | Peter, The 2010 _Citizens United_ Supreme Court decision opened the floodgates to nearly unlimited political spending in elections. Donations now flood in from corporations, billionaires, and lobbyists, silencing the voices of everyday people in favor of appeasing the rich. We saw this with the 2017 Trump tax cuts, and we'll certainly see it again if he wins re-election. Democrats have proposed a constitutional amendment that would allow Congress to eliminate the loopholes that allow companies to pour millions of dollars into campaigns and sway elections. But Mitch McConnell is standing in its way. He's intent on preserving the tight grip dark money and corporate donors have on politics, but we're going to stop him. With this new Democratic push, we're asking engaged Democrats to join us: [**Demand Congress overturn _Citizens United_!**](https://turnoutpac.bsd.net/page/m/78bcdff3/6e9863e8/17c7264d/1db05c4b/1799851106/VEsH/?g=mj_BT60LBwxdW4nnt4whVXA "https://sign.actiontaker.org/ECU-10-WDTO") Thank you, The WDTO Team [ADD YOUR NAME](https://turnoutpac.bsd.net/page/m/78bcdff3/6e9863e8/17c7264d/1db05c4b/1799851106/VEsE/?g=mj_BT60LBwxdW4nnt4whVXA "https://sign.actiontaker.org/ECU-10-WDTO")

name: EdMarkey.com
subject: [Photos] 12 days, 25 communities
disclaimer_text: Paid for by The Markey Committee
body:
Ed just wrapped up a 12-day, 25-community statewide tour -- meeting thousands of people in every corner of Massachusetts.
# [](https://ma.edmarkey.com/page/m/10c1dfa1/693b8b0a/43480338/72de7733/2092979197/VEsH/?g=-NfBFVNw52hcsCx35ezxeoA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/markey-em-2020?refcode=em_header")

Friends -
Ed just wrapped up a 12-day, 25-community statewide tour -- meeting thousands of people in every corner of Massachusetts.
From Gloucester, to Pittsfield, to Randolph, to Sturbridge, Ed shared his vision for this campaign and what it would take to enact our progressive agenda. At every stop, he brought more working families into our movement.
That's how we're going to win this. Person by person, we will build a grassroots army that cannot be stopped. That's why we have staff on the ground organizing all across Massachusetts, but we need to keep growing.
**[Will you make a $3 donation to our campaign today? We'll invest it immediately in our organizing program to expand our ground game across the state.](https://ma.edmarkey.com/page/m/10c1dfa1/693b8b0a/43480338/72de7732/2092979197/VEsE/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMDAxMTYtZnVsbCJ9/?g=-NfBFVNw52hcsCx35ezxeoA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/markey-january?refcode=em200116-full")**
I've won statewide campaigns in Massachusetts before, and I know that the work we're doing right now is tremendously important. This is what it looks like to run a grassroots campaign that can win.
Take a look at some highlights:
[](https://ma.edmarkey.com/page/m/10c1dfa1/693b8b0a/43480338/72de7732/2092979197/VEsF/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMDAxMTYtZnVsbCJ9/?g=-NfBFVNw52hcsCx35ezxeoA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/markey-january?refcode=em200116-full")
_Ed and progressive leaders in Fall River._
[](https://ma.edmarkey.com/page/m/10c1dfa1/693b8b0a/43480338/72de7732/2092979197/VEsC/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMDAxMTYtZnVsbCJ9/?g=-NfBFVNw52hcsCx35ezxeoA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/markey-january?refcode=em200116-full")
_Ed joined supporters in Sturbridge._
[](https://ma.edmarkey.com/page/m/10c1dfa1/693b8b0a/43480338/72de7732/2092979197/VEsD/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMDAxMTYtZnVsbCJ9/?g=-NfBFVNw52hcsCx35ezxeoA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/markey-january?refcode=em200116-full")
_Ed stopped by the New Bedford Whaling Museum for its annual Moby-Dick Marathon._
[](https://ma.edmarkey.com/page/m/10c1dfa1/693b8b0a/43480338/72de7732/2092979197/VEsA/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMDAxMTYtZnVsbCJ9/?g=-NfBFVNw52hcsCx35ezxeoA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/markey-january?refcode=em200116-full")
_Marching for Four Freedoms and our progressive vision in Pittsfield._
We are showing up everywhere and investing in every corner of the Commonwealth. Ed knows it is important to make sure every person is heard and has a voice in our democracy.
**[I'm asking you today to help us keep up this critical work by making a $3 donation to our campaign. It will go a long way.](https://ma.edmarkey.com/page/m/10c1dfa1/693b8b0a/43480338/72de7732/2092979197/VEsB/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMDAxMTYtZnVsbCJ9/?g=-NfBFVNw52hcsCx35ezxeoA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/markey-january?refcode=em200116-full")**
This race will not be easy. We've got serious opponents who are putting up a tough challenge this year. That's why we're getting a head start on doing the hard work that it will take to win. Thank you for supporting us in this fight.
All my best,
John Walsh
Campaign Manager
**[DONATE](https://ma.edmarkey.com/page/m/10c1dfa1/693b8b0a/43480338/72de7732/2092979197/VEsO/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMDAxMTYtZnVsbCJ9/?g=-NfBFVNw52hcsCx35ezxeoA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/markey-january?refcode=em200116-full")**

* * *
Paid for by The Markey Committee

We try to send only the most important information and opportunities to participate via email. To support Senator Ed Markey with a contribution, [click here](https://ma.edmarkey.com/page/m/10c1dfa1/693b8b0a/43480338/72de7730/2092979197/VEsHBQ/?g=-NfBFVNw52hcsCx35ezxeoA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/markey-em-2020?refcode=em_footer").

name: MJ Hegar
subject: I'm glad I didn't listen
disclaimer_text: Paid for by MJ for Texas
body:
|
---
[](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64890753/7f51f7bc/4a8756cb/4ef000d9/2294175880/VEsH/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/logo?refcode=emaillogo&amount=5")

| | Hi Peter --

I've spent a lot of my life doing things people told me I couldn't or shouldn't -- joining the Air Force, becoming a pilot, taking on the Pentagon to open ground combat roles for women, and yes, running for Senate. Oftentimes, they didn't think I could or should because I'm a woman. But I did what I believed in anyway -- and I'm proud of what I've accomplished.

**Today, I 'm proud to stand with three strong women running bold campaigns for Senate: Sara Gideon in Maine, Amy McGrath in Kentucky, and Theresa Greenfield in Iowa.**

**[Will you pitch in to support these women running for Senate? Your donation will be split between Sara, Amy, Theresa, and me to power our campaigns.](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64890753/7f51f7bc/4a8756cb/4ef000d8/2294175880/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6Ijc3MCJ9/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-hegargideonmcgrathgreenfield?refcode=email_20200116.2nd__770__&amount=10&recurring=true")** [**DONATE**](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64890753/7f51f7bc/4a8756cb/4ef000d8/2294175880/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6Ijc3MCJ9/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-hegargideonmcgrathgreenfield?refcode=email_20200116.2nd__770__&amount=10&recurring=true") Each of these women is running to build a better future for our children. I know they care as much as I do about lowering prescription drug prices, preserving protections for people with preexisting conditions, and ending the gun violence epidemic.

But we won't accomplish any of these things without electing these strong, smart, and principled women in Maine, Kentucky, and Iowa -- and defeating Sen. Cornyn here in Texas.

Mitch McConnell won't even allow the Senate to _vote_ on some of the most important issues facing our country today, and Sen. Cornyn is his right-hand man in the extreme partisanship and gridlock. That's why **right now** is the time to build a new Senate that actually _works_ for the people, NOT the special interests or D.C. bosses.

**So will you chip in right now to support Sara, Amy, Theresa, and me as we fight to build a better Senate,_and_ a better future for our children?** | _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately and be split between the four candidates._
---

**[Express donate $10>>](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64890753/7f51f7bc/4a8756cb/4ef000de/2294175880/VEsD/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6Ijc3MCJ9/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-hegargideonmcgrathgreenfield?express_lane=true&refcode=email_20200116.2nd__770__&amount=10")**
**[Express donate $25>>](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64890753/7f51f7bc/4a8756cb/4ef000dd/2294175880/VEsA/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6Ijc3MCJ9/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-hegargideonmcgrathgreenfield?express_lane=true&refcode=email_20200116.2nd__770__&amount=25")**

**[Or, donate a different amount>>](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64890753/7f51f7bc/4a8756cb/4ef000d3/2294175880/VEsO/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6Ijc3MCJ9/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-hegargideonmcgrathgreenfield?refcode=email_20200116.2nd__770__")**
Thanks for everything you do.

\-- MJ

[**DONATE**](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64890753/7f51f7bc/4a8756cb/4ef000d8/2294175880/VEsP/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6Ijc3MCJ9/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-hegargideonmcgrathgreenfield?refcode=email_20200116.2nd__770__&amount=10&recurring=true")
