name: Impeachment Update (via algreen.org)
subject: The next phase of impeachment
disclaimer_text: Paid for and Authorized by Keep Al Green in Congress
body:
[](https://act.myngp.com/el/ahaKgK_C-iK_SW3m4vXUDysKljAua8A87HNSe6CZNc8=/FCFOJG2qgLtZyDv4cX1myR_XgBV-B6CUmvldQCQjrD0=)
---
Folks, Yesterday, I voted to send articles of impeachment against President Trump to the Senate. _**Yet before the trial has even started, several Republican Senators have vowed to protect the President at all costs.**_ **We 've worked hard to hold the President accountable for his crimes, and we can't let up the pressure now. [Will you join the many others who have signed my petition as supporters who believe we deserve a fair, fact-based trial on impeachment charges?](https://act.myngp.com/el/ahaKgK_C-iK_SW3m4vXUDysKljAua8A87HNSe6CZNc8=/FCFOJG2qgLtZyDv4cX1myR_XgBV-B6CUmvldQCQjrD0=)** | **[SIGN THE PETITION ⇨](https://act.myngp.com/el/ahaKgK_C-iK_SW3m4vXUDysKljAua8A87HNSe6CZNc8=/FCFOJG2qgLtZyDv4cX1myR_XgBV-B6CUmvldQCQjrD0=)**
---
We must continue to speak up for justice.
Thanks,
Congressman Al Green

name: Paul Shashy, Campaign Manager
subject: Please let Coach know what YOU think!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tuberville for Senate, Inc
body:
Our team has been working hard for months building support for Coach Tuberville’s campaign for U.S. Senate... and we’ll be battling in the trenches for him until election day!
[ ](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/c8e2774da8d4d6d3c3d6b838967d376c/33013/c22427978f0f8ea7/084497751ec9bc54c3d6b838967d376c/33013) Peter, Our team has been working hard for months building support for Coach Tuberville’s campaign for U.S. Senate... and we’ll be battling in the trenches for him until election day!
**Coach is putting together his game plan, and feedback from Alabama’s grassroots conservatives is critical. We need a few moments of your time to help us cement our course of action**.

**[Take a moment to share your opinion, by participating in our 2020 Issues Survey!](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/c8e2774da8d4d6d3c3d6b838967d376c/33013/c22427978f0f8ea7/55713951eade5354c3d6b838967d376c/33013) ** Please take a few moments to complete this short survey. [ Take the 2020 Issues Survey >> ](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/c8e2774da8d4d6d3c3d6b838967d376c/33013/c22427978f0f8ea7/3a44d1e27f7111e4c3d6b838967d376c/33013) Coach is looking forward to reviewing the results of this survey. Patriotic Alabamians like you are the backbone of this campaign, and your input is vital as we work to build and sustain a strong operation across Alabama.

Thank you in advance for sharing your opinion, Peter!

Sincerely,

Paul Shashy
Campaign Manager, Tuberville for Senate [ Take the 2020 Issues Survey >> ](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/c8e2774da8d4d6d3c3d6b838967d376c/33013/c22427978f0f8ea7/41281506cf8fa6e0c3d6b838967d376c/33013) | | [](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/c8e2774da8d4d6d3c3d6b838967d376c/33013/c22427978f0f8ea7/f6ea0afcddb69eadc3d6b838967d376c/33013) | [](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/c8e2774da8d4d6d3c3d6b838967d376c/33013/c22427978f0f8ea7/036a7fe405e3dcddc3d6b838967d376c/33013) | [](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/c8e2774da8d4d6d3c3d6b838967d376c/33013/c22427978f0f8ea7/c094437c7a46646cc3d6b838967d376c/33013)

subject: just talked to the team
disclaimer_text: Paid for by A Whole Lot of Folks for Wilmot Collins

name: TomSteyer.com
subject: It's time for the corporations and wealthy to pay their fair share
disclaimer_text: paid for by closing loopholes and making corporations and the wealthy pay their fair share
body:
| | | |
---
---
Today, Tom released his Working Families Tax Cut, and we wanted to make sure you saw it. In short, Tom’s plan puts cash back in the pockets of working families, and it will be paid for by closing loopholes and making corporations and the wealthy pay their fair share. [_**We hope you’ll take a moment to read more about it, then add your name to join Tom’s fight for our future.**_](http://clicks.tomsteyer.com/wf/click?upn=cBSXlkRq21E9V5onLqLCBguGO1iUd2XLcKbWoq181-2BVNa2iELerMufuKt-2B0389kKf7fhrvp1G4sdCdeKTqSTdlvXieqhcQD-2B7lWy-2F3TGrZCqw6ZNh9s6CHYzknnpATgH8-2BQmaSQGZOmG0r46L48XHYc97nlNnMr95Bf-2BFeVoWeUIH1-2BV5f0jPaWJz4ZsowA-2BCsVI2xTfR91XB8C2WnA-2Fc1ICLvHVJ2aO9t-2Fd6HLAhzM-3D_enNSH-2FxHAAqXgxiHRFihpX91d75ERAkpfg4XQfmYhCFCgEVvHZJIBnVwrwztgYJz4eFq9BMkyZwT1fV8gU3hTKgydBXEIdOTn-2BDH-2Bd74DFfh-2B4QF5Xb1np1nhenSjdDiJ8NH5heIZTu9JRa5qMmFI9RkQFzqPac1T7brbHT2CI1zrhCjSqj9G6Gwo76qirN3wUvjrTDNhn-2F3-2Bt7SyZe5VCfEvmAx6GRvjc4wZ5-2F2jJUs3IpDo57UOZHkfA9rmGTSjTzmo-2BOtRpW7oWYizd3ZOmyN2n0H07UHxABldD-2FoJ5JJ1YgAYUyMvNJBzyGTbxtRYB1tieKZycQveHRKHUF98riT9SKgpHuI6oqG8YkAmKgES3S9X3gT1uGCBoqXQIjYBqhtnRjs3nzzZAulbxCY4mZSZI-2BtmnpV7xlUkVDqJexKMqnM19fJi8SA7qraDXvz) Tom is passionate about building prosperity for all Americans, not just the wealthiest few. Everything he plans to do as president — from sweeping structural changes in Congress to immediate action on climate — is centered around empowering the people. His Working Families Tax Cut is no exception: **It will give families a 10% tax cut, institute a wealth tax, end Trump’s disastrous tax cuts, and help redirect resources to education, health care, and child care.** This tax plan will also drive America forward by creating long-term, well-paying jobs with a $2 trillion investment into our infrastructure. For working-class families struggling to balance health care costs and child care costs, this means a little more breathing room to make ends meet. For the top 5% and big corporations, it means paying their fair share and giving back to the economy responsible for their success. For America, it’s one step toward economic equality. [_**Read Tom’s plan, and add your name if you support lifting up working families and building prosperity for all.**_](http://clicks.tomsteyer.com/wf/click?upn=cBSXlkRq21E9V5onLqLCBguGO1iUd2XLcKbWoq181-2BVNa2iELerMufuKt-2B0389kKf7fhrvp1G4sdCdeKTqSTdlvXieqhcQD-2B7lWy-2F3TGrZCqw6ZNh9s6CHYzknnpATgH8-2BQmaSQGZOmG0r46L48XHYc97nlNnMr95Bf-2BFeVoWeUIH1-2BV5f0jPaWJz4ZsowA-2BCsVI2xTfR91XB8C2WnA-2Fc1ICLvHVJ2aO9t-2Fd6HLAhzM-3D_enNSH-2FxHAAqXgxiHRFihpX91d75ERAkpfg4XQfmYhCFCgEVvHZJIBnVwrwztgYJz4eFq9BMkyZwT1fV8gU3hTKgydBXEIdOTn-2BDH-2Bd74DFfh-2B4QF5Xb1np1nhenSjdDiJ8NH5heIZTu9JRa5qMmFI9RkQFzqPac1T7brbHT2CI1zrhCjSqj9G6Gwo76qirN3wUvjrTDNhn-2F3-2Bt7SyZe5VCfEvmAx6GRvjc4wZ5-2F2jJVWB7-2B4wOkO0zV6pNrbf-2B9pFb-2FPUd5sqf8iPcZ2-2BO2qmfKRDia-2BsVVN01U8eXBLQUsFkSGZOagMFJRojX4nl6wiiTsrRJWUZqBJQlSg-2BN-2BRAEbExntqMImYGmo2A6iFDsHRINQDUbJ30AAkdxdiiTr3RMteh3MqcZ-2FRprXXdVZ-2BomG4L0PFtNO1J3LapdDu-2BCuIhu81rmKoueNBeeZ5hMH1) Building a fair future,

clean_body: | | | | Today, Tom released his Working Families Tax Cut, and we wanted to make sure you saw it. In short, Tom’s plan puts cash back in the pockets of working families, and it will be paid for by closing loopholes and making corporations and the wealthy pay their fair share. Tom is passionate about building prosperity for all Americans, not just the wealthiest few. Everything he plans to do as president — from sweeping structural changes in Congress to immediate action on climate — is centered around empowering the people. His Working Families Tax Cut is no exception: It will give families a 10% tax cut, institute a wealth tax, end Trump’s disastrous tax cuts, and help redirect resources to education, health care, and child care. This tax plan will also drive America forward by creating long-term, well-paying jobs with a $2 trillion investment into our infrastructure. For working-class families struggling to balance health care costs and child care costs, this means a little more breathing room to make ends meet. For the top 5% and big corporations, it means paying their fair share and giving back to the economy responsible for their success. For America, it’s one step toward economic equality. Building a fair future, Tom 2020 | | "Facebook " | "Twitter " | "Instagram " ---|---|--- | Thank you for being a part of this campaign! name: Team Bennet
subject: today is our day
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Bennet for America
body:
we can't do it without you | |
---
| Team,

We may be an underdog in this race.

We might not have the media circus or the endless vault of cash.

[But every dog has its day, team. We've persevered while other candidates have stumbled or dropped out - we're breaking our fundraising records and gaining momentum in crucial early states.](https://secure.michaelbennet.com/page/m/35cbabef/134673f2/815abfd/69974861/2405600536/VEsH/?g=GUSlGlH8x8Vcy9-bgCeB4mA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/nhinvestment?refcode=EM_FR_B2_011620_AC_ND&recurring=auto&amount=1&amounts=10,29,50,100,250,500,1000")

We told you we need $700,000 in order to stay competitive, keep our ads running, and host as many town halls as possible.

[We're 92% of the way there - but if we don't hit our goal, we'll be forced to make frightening budget cuts.](https://secure.michaelbennet.com/page/m/35cbabef/134673f2/815abfd/69974861/2405600536/VEsE/?g=GUSlGlH8x8Vcy9-bgCeB4mA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/nhinvestment?refcode=EM_FR_B2_011620_AC_ND&recurring=auto&amount=1&amounts=10,29,50,100,250,500,1000")

[But if we reach our goals, we'll be able to get Michael's message on air in front of the two-thirds of undecided Democratic voters.](https://secure.michaelbennet.com/page/m/35cbabef/134673f2/815abfd/69974861/2405600536/VEsF/?g=GUSlGlH8x8Vcy9-bgCeB4mA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/nhinvestment?refcode=EM_FR_B2_011620_AC_ND&recurring=auto&amount=1&amounts=10,29,50,100,250,500,1000")

[So what do you say, team? Make your first donation of any amount before our midnight deadline! >>](https://secure.michaelbennet.com/page/m/35cbabef/134673f2/815abfd/69974861/2405600536/VEsC/?g=GUSlGlH8x8Vcy9-bgCeB4mA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/nhinvestment?refcode=EM_FR_B2_011620_AC_ND&recurring=auto&amount=1&amounts=10,29,50,100,250,500,1000")

We started the year being outraised by other campaigns. The good news is that we have really made up some ground this month with your support, **but some of our programs still need an extra boost right now.**

Our advertising budget is slightly behind where it needs to be, and this weekend we need to spread our message of big, structural change across Iowa ahead of the caucuses.

Our goal is to receive enough contributions from this email to execute the complete advertising plan we have.

This is a close race, and the Iowa caucuses are the first electoral contest of this primary.

Every day between now and February 3 is a new opportunity to connect with an undecided voter and inspire them to join our movement for big, structural change.

For every person who sees a video of Elizabeth explaining the Ultra-Millionaire Tax, or hears an ad about why Elizabeth is in this fight, and then feels inspired to caucus for her, it will be thanks to grassroots supporters like you who chipped in today and made it possible.

name: M.E. Smith for Team Hick
subject: Update
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Hickenlooper for Colorado
body:
|
#
Hi, team. M.E. here. John's campaign manager. We just got word that yet _another_ national outlet has ranked our opponent, Cory Gardner, as the most vulnerable Republican Senator in 2020. Nate Silver's _FiveThirtyEight_ , _Roll Call_ , _the Hill_ , and now _National Journal 's Hotline_ are picking up on what we already know -- **our campaign is the Democrats ' best chance to flip a Senate seat and take back the majority come November.** We have momentum on our side. But that means special interests and dark money groups are already dumping big money into Colorado to try to sway this election. We can't let the GOP swoop in to buy this Senate seat out from under us. Our very first fundraising deadline of 2020 ends tomorrow. This is arguably our most important one yet, so I have to ask: **Will you add a donation to our campaign for U.S. Senate today? It 's incredibly important we hit our very first fundraising deadline of the new year tomorrow to prove we have what it takes to win.** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | [CHIP IN $10 NOW](https://secure.hickenlooper.?g=Wvb-QcQot1BcsCb456pUfvA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jwh-em-200116-me?refcode=em-200116-b&amount=10&express_lane=true&amounts=5,10,25,50,100,150,250&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&addr1=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&employer=&occupation=")

name: =?utf-8?Q?Greg=20Casar?=
subject: A letter from Austin City Councilmember Greg Casar
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY HEIDI FOR CONGRESS
body:
Today, I'm endorsing Heidi Sloan for Congress. | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/be31c1825161/a-letter-from-austin-city-councilmember-greg-casar?e=c169cb0a8e)
---
| |
---
| |
#
Hey y’all,
My name is Greg Casar, and I’m an Austin City Councilmember. Today, **I’m announcing my endorsement of Heidi Sloan’s campaign.**
Before becoming the youngest person ever elected to Austin City Council, I was a community organizer at Workers Defense Project where I mobilized immigrant workers to hold the Texas construction industry accountable for low wages and poor working conditions. **Like Heidi, my starting point was in our community** , talking to my neighbors and bringing them together to create real change.
As a Councilmember, I’ve seen Heidi’s leadership push campaigns to victory many times. She helped us win Paid Sick Days, supporting similar successful campaigns in Dallas and San Antonio. She rallied our community around the Freedom City policy I sponsored, which decreased discretionary arrests in Austin by 85% after passing. She championed the effort to decriminalize homelessness in Austin, mobilizing DSA members to knock thousands of doors for the campaign. She’s stepped up to stand with communities of color in Austin time and time again, supporting Black & Brown leaders in demanding transparency and accountability in the police contract and fighting against racism in Austin Police Department.
---
| [Check out our announcement video!](https://gmail.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=11eb676804bfa0f7eac2ca97a&id=be4b87243f&e=c169cb0a8e "Check out our announcement video!")
---
| It’s not every day that somebody like Heidi runs for office, and **we have a tremendous opportunity to get this organizer into Congress**. After organizing from the dais for years, I can tell you Heidi would not be an ordinary Congresswoman - because she is building a movement, because she is a transformative leader who is ready to take on not just the corruption in our government, but the exploitation at the heart of our systems. We can’t pass this opportunity up.
A vote for Heidi is a vote for the kind of leadership that brings people in. I hope y’all will join me in supporting her with everything we’ve got.
In solidarity,
Greg Casar

clean_body: Today, I'm endorsing Heidi Sloan for Congress. | | | | | | | Hey y’all, My name is Greg Casar, and I’m an Austin City Councilmember. Today, I’m announcing my endorsement of Heidi Sloan’s campaign. Before becoming the youngest person ever elected to Austin City Council, I was a community organizer at Workers Defense Project where I mobilized immigrant workers to hold the Texas construction industry accountable for low wages and poor working conditions. Like Heidi, my starting point was in our community , talking to my neighbors and bringing them together to create real change. As a Councilmember, I’ve seen Heidi’s leadership push campaigns to victory many times. She helped us win Paid Sick Days, supporting similar successful campaigns in Dallas and San Antonio. She rallied our community around the Freedom City policy I sponsored, which decreased discretionary arrests in Austin by 85% after passing. She championed the effort to decriminalize homelessness in Austin, mobilizing DSA members to knock thousands of doors for the campaign. She’s stepped up to stand with communities of color in Austin time and time again, supporting Black & Brown leaders in demanding transparency and accountability in the police contract and fighting against racism in Austin Police Department. | "Check out our announcement video!" | It’s not every day that somebody like Heidi runs for office, and we have a tremendous opportunity to get this organizer into Congress. name: =?utf-8?Q?The=20White=20House?=
subject: Out with NAFTA, in with USMCA!
body:
In 2016, candidate Donald J. Trump made a promise that was familiar to voters across America: He would do away with the job-killing NAFTA... | | | | [ ](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=44f817fc9f&e=3ee4985eea)
---
| The White House • January 16, 2020
---
| | |
# **Out with NAFTA, in with USMCA! **

**In 2016, candidate****Donald J. Trump** made a promise that was familiar to voters across America: He would do away with the job-killing NAFTA as President and replace it with a better deal for American workers, businesses, and customers.

**The promise** wasn’t unique, but the result was. Today, after years of Washington neglect on trade, the Senate approved President Trump’s United States–Mexico–Canada Agreement (USMCA) to replace NAFTA by an overwhelming 89-10 margin.

**Republicans and Democrats** alike had long criticized NAFTA for its weak labor and environmental provisions, among other flaws. Many promised to scrap it and push for new negotiations with Canada and Mexico. “NAFTA’s shortcomings were evident when signed and we must now amend the agreement to fix them,” then-candidate Barack Obama pledged in 2008, the year he was elected President.

**Nothing happened** , and the Obama Administration slowly walked back its promises to get tough on trade. A decade later, President Trump would keep his.

**Press Secretary Grisham:**[USMCA will deliver billions for our farmers](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=9eea349b9a&e=3ee4985eea)

**The new agreement** is a landmark victory for American working- and middle-class families. The U.S. International Trade Commission estimates that within 5 years, USMCA could add up to $235 billion in new economic growth—and 589,000 jobs—to the U.S. economy. Just as important, the deal will put in place the strongest and most comprehensive labor protections of any trade agreement in American history.

**While Democrats in Congress** try to distract voters from the record-setting Trump Economy, the President keeps delivering on his signature campaign promises. Just yesterday, he joined the Vice Premier of China to sign a historic Phase 1 deal that addresses Beijing’s unfair trade practices, including intellectual property theft.

**The unemployment rate** is the lowest it’s been since 1969. America has its best economy in at least 50 years. With a major China trade deal in the books and USMCA set to replace NAFTA, it’s about to get even better.

[Kellyanne Conway: How both Speaker Pelosi and President Trump made history](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=6acf1fd475&e=3ee4985eea)
---
|
---
|
## **Video of the day: Phase 1 deal with China signed!**
---
| [ ](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=896452d2f3&e=3ee4985eea)
---
| **President Trump made history** yesterday by completing Phase 1 of a new trade agreement with China. With China’s Vice Premier at the White House for the ceremony, the two leaders expressed hope for a future of harmony and shared prosperity.

**“Together, we are righting** the wrongs of the past and delivering a future of economic justice and security for American workers, farmers, and families,” President Trump said.

[“The agreement is a credit to President Trump’s China strategy and a mark against his detractors.”](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=a27be97e6b&e=3ee4985eea)
---
|
---
|
# **Protecting prayer in America’s schools**

**Religious freedom** is one of the founding principles of our country**.** Since taking office, President Trump has tasked his Administration with doing everything it can to protect what many call our “first right” as citizens: the power to worship freely.

**For National Religious Freedom Day,** the Trump Administration is taking another step to safeguard our religious liberties. Today, the President updated Federal guidance on prayer and religious expression in public schools: To receive Federal funds, local educational agencies must confirm that their policies do not prevent or interfere with every student’s right to pray.

**“From its opening pages,** the story of America has been rooted in the truth that all men and women are endowed with the right to follow their conscience, worship freely, and live in accordance with their convictions,” President Trump said in a statement.

[Read President Trump’s Proclamation for Religious Freedom Day, 2020.](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=5435736585&e=3ee4985eea)
---
|

[Privacy Policy](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=9201c6fbf4&e=3ee4985eea) | [Contact the White House](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=e3ba57492e&e=3ee4985eea) | [Unsubscribe](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=8cafb01033&e=3ee4985eea&c=70bf9f8487)
---
| | | The White House * 1600 Pennsylvania Ave NW * Washington, DC 20500 * USA · 202-456-1111
---
